title: NoChestTake
body:
# NoChestTake
NoChestTake is a plugins witch allow players to protect theirs blocks!
You can protect every openable/tile entity.

# How to protect

To protect, you just need to shift+click on a protectable block with a sign in your hand
When you place the sign and the [PRIVATE] line is blue, the supporting block is protected!


![Locked chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4a8785e2d30d740c33c37c7c488d6b4823194c0_0.webp)

# How to add player

To add player to the locked block, you just need to add their name to the sign (maximum 3 name)


![2 Player chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abbefd2e077341a8054a5061efa979644f4d0d3e_0.webp)

# What if your not authorized?

If you are not authorized on a protected block, you cannot break, interact or do anything with the block and the sign.
Redstone will not be working and if it's a door, the supporting block of the door will be protected too.

![Protected Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e19d2b34c161d6f5196f403883cb1b677c0f071a.png)

# What can you do if you're OP?

If you're OP on the server, you can do /privatesigninfo. This will show the number of protected sign and the position of every one of them

![OP /privatesigninfo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcad6c1ef7950722326ea7a5ef5d0626dc177834_0.webp)
